title: Lateral Thinking Pack
description: Short riddles and lateral twists for quick sessions.

challenges.question: What has keys but can't open locks?
challenges.explanation: A keyboard has keys but doesn't open locks.

challenges.question: What gets wetter the more it dries?
challenges.explanation: A towel gets wetter as it dries things.

challenges.question: What has a head, a tail, but no body?
challenges.explanation: A coin has a head and a tail.
